patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes:
The Somachord’s UI in the Personal Quarters has a new look for all your music listening needs!
Also added helpful tips about the Somachord and Tones.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Four new Somarchord Songs are available to unlock by finding Somachord Fragments located throughout the ‘Break Narmer’ missions.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error that could occur when logging out with Soma Prime equipped.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted how the Somatics blend with the Holdfast NPC’s.
patchlogs.fixes:
Four new Somarchord Songs are available to unlock by finding Somachord Fragments located throughout Garrison Assignment missions.
Fixed script error related to the Soma Prime.

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.8
patchlogs.changes: Added additional spawn points for Voidplumes, Somachord Fragments, Storage Containers, and Zarium Accolades throughout the Zariman tileset.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Operator Somatics Markings not showing up.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes: Hunt down and scan Somachord Tones throughout the Zariman tileset to unlock 3 new tracks:

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.changes:
Additionally, 3 ‘The New War’ Somachord Tones have been added to the post-New War Plains of Eidolon and Orb Vallis. Based on player feedback, we have made these Somachord Tones stationary, meaning they will always be in the same spot (different from the original Orb Vallis Somachord Tones) and require 1 scan each. They’ll remain in their spots after Scanned for helpful Tenno who waypoint them for others!
Keep a look out for the following Somachord Tones:

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Helminth Ability ‘Golden Instinct’ not functioning for Somachords and Frame Fighter fragments.

patchlogs.name: Prime Resurgence: Hotfix 30.9.4
patchlogs.changes: Soma Prime

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Update 30
patchlogs.fixes: Added Somachord Fragments for a special tune (avoiding spoilers here) from Call of the Tempestarii.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed outdated name for the Derelict Somachord; it is now Deimos Somachord. 
Fixed Prime details (specifically the golden ring) persisting on skins equipped on the Soma Prime.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Soma Prime's Hata-Satya Mod not respecting Multishot for Clients.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.8 + 29.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed certain Warframe abilities (Mesa's Shattered Shield, Mag's Magnetize) that create reflecting bullets counting towards hits that increase the Hata-Satya Critical Chance buff. Only hits performed by Soma Prime should increase the Hata-Satya Critical Chance buff.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29
patchlogs.changes: Soma prime:

patchlogs.name: Nightwave Series 3: Glassmaker: Hotfix 27.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Somachord music playing in the background when entering the Leverian.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave Series 3: Glassmaker: Hotfix 27.5.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Somachord music playing in the background of Nightwave crime scenes.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Update 27
patchlogs.changes:
Soma: 0.85->1
Soma Prime: 0.85->0.95

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes:
A new node has been added on Lua featuring Disruption revisit your past for a chance to earn Somatic Fibres, a necessary component in Lua Lens construction!
Fixed missing button callouts for toggling the Somachords ‘autoplay’ when using a controller.

patchlogs.name: Augment Tweaks: Hotfix 25.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Somachord tracks not properly skipping: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1076110-somachord-doesnt-properly-skip-non-mandachord-song/

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Soma and Soma Forest-Camo Skin not feeding the clip through the gun as you fire.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.3.1 - Nightwave
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Somachord music playing over top The Wolf of Saturn Six opening diorama.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.4
patchlogs.additions: The ‘Fluid Mechanics’ ambient music track has been added as a Somachord Tone out in Orb Vallis!

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: The Profit-Taker - Update 24.2
patchlogs.changes: New Fortuna Somachord Fragments can also be discovered out in Orb Vallis to bring that chilly vibe into your Orbiter:

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.6
patchlogs.changes: Nova Prime, Mag Prime, Soma Prime, Boar Prime, Dakra Prime, and Vasto Prime Relics have been added to Plains of Eidolon Bounties, Orb Vallis Bounties, and in the Void drop table.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Music Volume slider not affecting Mandachord songs in the Somachord.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.3.0 + 23.3.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Increased the gain on the ‘Your Creator’ Somachord tune.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Prime Vault Hotfix 23.1.2!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed The Sacrifice Somachord fragment unlocks being in random order, which could result in fragments not spawning, or spawning when they shouldn't.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.1.1
patchlogs.changes:
Removed the lore/Somachord Fragments spawning in the last mission of The Sacrifice quest. As you probably know, the pacing of that last mission doesn’t really warrant a Fragment search!
All Mandachord songs (other than the default song) will now appear in the Somachord, between the unlocked tracks and the locked tracks.
Added per-song autoplay toggle to the Somachord.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed previewing Nakak's masks defaulting your Operators Somatic colours.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.1.0: TennoGen Round 13
patchlogs.additions:
The Sacrifice is now replayable!  2 new original quest songs have been added to the Somachord from the Sacrifice soundtrack. You can find and scan the Fragments by re-playing the quest! 
These Somachord Fragments must be scanned in mission order from beginning to end in order to collect them all. If you miss one in mission 3 (for example) you can replay the quest and begin your search at mission 3 instead of back at mission 1.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Somachord playing music while viewing some intro quest cinematics.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.3
patchlogs.changes: Removed the controller D-Pad function from the Somachord as it does not function there.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.13.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error in Somachord if the loop button is pressed while no songs are playing.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.12.3
patchlogs.changes: Somachord volume setting is now saved across all sessions.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.11.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed player-marked Somachords having the wrong icons.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.changes:
Somachord now continues playing where you left off when you return to your Orbiter.
Somachord Tones now have their own marker icon when waypointing/finding one in a mission.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.8.0 + Hotfix 22.8.0.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Somachord: Add ambiance to your Orbiter with the Somachord! Unlock songs by locating and scanning Somachord Tones scattered throughout the Solar System. Find them all to complete songs!
Fixed scrolling in the Somachord

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: One of Warframe’s biggest appeals is the diverse selection of weaponry. Even within the subclasses of rifles and pistols, there is huge variety to be found, such as the distinction between projectile weapons (firing physical projectiles which move through space, like the Boltor) and hitscan weapons (firing draws an imaginary line between the gun and the point aimed at, doing damage instantly to whatever it hits, like the Soma). For obvious reasons, hitscans are very effective at long distances
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed skins on the Soma not previewing on its clip in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Soma skins not applying to the clip when previewed.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed hitscan weapons like Soma Prime hitting enemies outside of the rift upon deactivation of Limbo’s Stasis.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.3.2
patchlogs.changes: Slightly reduced the damage of Soma and Soma Prime in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.3.1 + 16.3.1.1 + Tactical Alert
patchlogs.fixes: Soma Prime is now usable in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes:
New Soma-inspired weapons available now!
Tenno, complement your Soma with the power of the Aksomati pistols and the razor-sharp Dual Raza hatchets. Get them separately or purchase them with the Soma assault rifle in a discounted bundle!
The devastating power of the Soma rifle compacted into two elegant pistols.
These razor-sharp battle hatchets are designed to complement the Soma.
This bundle features the Soma assault rifle, Dual Raza hatchets and Aksomati pistols. Sharing a unique style, the weapons in this set will inspire awe in your allies and fear in your foes.
Updated audio on Soma and Soma Prime.
Fixed an issue with the Soma where the weapon clip would sit in the wrong position.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: ·         Fixed additional ammo clips showing on Soma and Soma Prime.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.1
